CustomField.description: Engine-internal count of CONSECUTIVE re-drives of this step after a transient row-lock error (UNABLE_TO_LOCK_ROW), e.g. a fan-in where many child-completion signals lock the shared parent row at once. Bounds those retries so a genuinely stuck row still fails, and is kept separate from the business Retry_Count__c so lock contention never eats a step's RetryPolicy budget. Reset to 0 on the next successful drive.
CustomField.label: Transient Retry Count
